title: Shiny's Entity Models Plus
description: Realistic entity models using vanilla textures.
body: ╔═══╣DESCRIPTION╠═══╗ This pack changes entities to be more realistic. In the pack, it changes animals to look a little more realistic, 3d ears, extra fluff, and adds 3d tails. This is a collection of some of my old packs that I really enjoyed making, including some new works too, which I feel makes the game look a lot better ╔═══╣CREDITS╠═══╗ ShinyDragon96 - Owner, Textures, Models, Organizer, Publisher ╔═══╣ Extras ╠═══╗ Simplistic Pack — ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack Green Screens — Shiny's Green Screen! ╔═══╣ Copyright ╠═══╗ Shiny's Entity Models Plus© 2021 by ShinyDragon96 is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0! - If you use this pack in a video, post, or anything else, it must be linked back to here & credited in my name - !
